content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Market is under heavy selling pressure with NIFTY -1.36%, IT crashing -5.52%, and VIX spiking +5.92% to 19.69. Risk-off environment with broad-based weakness. Book is 68% deployed with net -0.00% P&L — priority is position management, not new entries. Late session (14:12, 1h17m to close) with event risk (INDUSINDBK, RELIANCE results today; AUBANK Apr 27; HUL, GRANULES Apr 29-30).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.8% but thesis intact: Q4 results strong (+35% PAT, credit growth 22%, NIM 3.95%, CASA 52.5%). Broker targets ₹88-90. Today's price 76.84 is above SL 74.50 with ~3% cushion. Support at 76.95 being tested; if it holds, setup for rebound. SL already positioned below recent swing low. No-op MODIFY would waste signal — hold current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SKIP — current SL 1013.22 already locks in profits above entry 984. P&L +4.5%. Thesis strong (record FY26, GNPA <1%, MOFSL target 1143). Will emit HOLD below."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +4.5% with CMP 1034.60 vs SL 1013.22 (already above entry, locking in ~3% gain). Target 1100 remains achievable (MOFSL PT 1143). Current SL structure is optimal — trailing higher too aggressively risks getting shaken out by volatility in choppy market. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge working as designed — down only -0.8% while NIFTY -1.36%, IT -5.5%. Gold consolidating at ₹124; ETF structurally supported by USD weakness and geopolitical premium. SL at 119 is 4% below, appropriate for low-volatility defensive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.7%, holding at 1417 near 52w high (1425). Strong Q4 (+26% PAT, double-digit volumes). Trailing SL up not yet warranted — gain <2% threshold. Current SL 1405 is tight (below entry 1412.94 by <1%). No change needed; the position is well-calibrated already."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 3,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, relative strength vs banking sector weakness. P&L +1.0% — just below +2% trail threshold. Current SL 1045 is already just below entry. Q4 audited results Apr 27 is binary event risk 1 trading day away — may want to exit before results rather than trail tighter and get shaken out. Hold into results; re-evaluate next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 3,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event ~3 trading days away. SL 672 at ~1.3% below entry is tight. FDA warning letter overhang + stock at top of analyst target band (587-687) makes binary risk asymmetric. Hold through one more session; consider booking partial or exiting before Apr 29 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.6%, CMP 2309 vs SL 2260 (~2% cushion remaining). Results Apr 30. Stock dropped from 2366 to 2309 today despite 'defensive' label — FMCG defensive thesis not holding in this tape. Thesis not broken yet (board meeting catalyst intact) but risk is elevated. Hold with current SL; if it breaks 2260, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.0%, holding in tight range. SL 393 ~1.8% below CMP. Sector strong YTD, NTPC discounted at 14.88x P/E vs peers 20x. Q4 results May 15 — outside current hold window but supportive. Current SL is appropriately tight given choppy market. No change."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 74.50 well-positioned below support; fundamentals strong. Give it room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking ~3% gain; target 1100 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge performing its role; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain <2%, SL already at tight 1405; no trail yet needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1045 just below entry; Apr 27 Q4 results = binary event; don't tighten further into event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Apr 29 binary event; current SL 672 is tight at 1.3% below entry; re-evaluate next session."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6%; SL 2260 ~2% below CMP; let SL do its job. If breached, exit discipline kicks in."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 393 ~1.8% below CMP; tight and appropriate for current volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CLEAN: 12.8x volume surge with price barely moving (+0.19%) — classic distribution pattern near 52w low area (stock down 36% YoY). Bearish fundamentals (Q3 PAT -30%, sales -8.8%). Not an accumulation signal — skip. HSCL, COCHINSHIP, ONESOURCE: momentum already extended, late-session chase against risk-off tape is poor R:R. OFSS divergence interesting but IT sector carnage (-5.5%) makes counter-trend longs dangerous. DRREDDY high volume on dip needs clarity — monitor for follow-through. RELIANCE/INDUSINDBK: results today — wait for reaction tomorrow. BRITANNIA, NAVINFLUOR: defensive/specialty theme noted but book already at 68% deployed — no capacity for new adds.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed with 8 holdings across PSU banks, HFC, gold ETF, FMCG (2x), private bank, pharma, power. Cluster check: AUBANK + MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING = 3 financials (~30% weight) — at cluster limit, no more financial adds. NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR = FMCG cluster (~25% weight) — at limit. Hysteresis rule engaged: net-flat/slightly-negative P&L with >60% deployed = NO new entries. Multiple Q4 earnings events over next 3-5 trading days (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30) create concentrated binary risk. Priority next 2-3 ticks: monitor SLs, consider pre-earnings trim on positions where SL cushion is thin and holding through results is unfavorable R:R."
}
